desk.plan: Enter SMR at 13.96 with support at 13.80. Stop is 13.46, first target 14.96 — a clean 2:1. The thesis is simple: +14% in 5 days, above VWAP, strong relative volume — this is a momentum name in a risk-on tape. Half size because Research is right that there's no fundamental catalyst; if the move was purely technical noise, you'll find out quickly below 13.80.

desk.plan: Enter BZ at 14.68 with the support pivot sitting way down at 13.35. Stop is tighter at 13.51, target 17.03 — the wide range gives you room to work. The thesis: bullish MACD cross, +10% 5-day surge, closing at the high. Half size because Research flags the lack of a news catalyst and durability is a fair question. The thing that makes you wrong is if this fades straight back through 13.51 — that gap between entry and stop is wide, so size accordingly.

desk.plan: Enter NXE at 12.42, support at 12.23. Stop is 12.05, target 13.16 — a 2:1 setup with a tight, clean structure. The thesis: +13% in 5 days, RSI at a healthy 58.8 (not stretched), and a tidy momentum build on the spark. Half size because Research's reversion concern is legitimate without a fundamental driver. You're wrong if price breaks 12.23 support and confirms a failed breakout.
